runtimeEntries.purpose: Compiled GhostText multiline model weights and character map.
Compiled NES prompt and response tags.
Bundled parser language support and WASM loading.
Bundled detailed line diff implementation used by NES rebase.
Bundled text/range conversion used by the NES diff runtime.
Bundled position-to-offset transformation used by the NES diff runtime.

dynamicResourceAudits.resolution: Generic dist resource locator; tokenizer and parser callers have explicit resource declarations.
Tree-sitter runtime and supported grammars are declared as exact package resources.

externalResources.reason: The files are installed from the exact upstream package and are not Git blobs in microsoft/vscode.
